title: Benthamia lycopsoides

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in reducing pain and improving cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Benthamia lycopsoides include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. It is typically found in shaded, humid environments.
